---
title: Reference MDX Article Fixture
description: Test article fixture for canonical MDX references.
date: 2026-01-02T00:00:00.000Z
author: Test Author
tags:
  - test
---

MDX article fixtures can cite a source.[^cite-mdx-article-source]

MDX article fixtures can also use a note.[^note-mdx-article-context]

[^note-mdx-article-context]: This explanatory note belongs to the MDX article fixture.

```tpm-bibtex
@article{mdx-article-source,
  author = {Source, MDX},
  title = {Reference Fixture},
  year = {2026},
  url = {https://example.com/mdx-article-source}
}
```
